blocks.title: Welcome to Forge Junction
blocks.body: You're running the first public build. Updates will arrive automatically in the background — you'll see a notification in the bottom-right corner when one is ready to install.

blocks.title: Initial Release
blocks.body: First public build of Forge Junction. Includes full Pirate Diffusion workflow catalogue access, structured prompt editor, render queue, debug reporting, and auto-update system.
items: Full workflow catalogue via Pirate Diffusion API
Structured prompt & parameter editor with workflow-aware slots
Live render queue with status feedback
Debug report export (Help → Export Debug Report)
Auto-update system — future releases install in the background

blocks.title: Quick Tip: Safe LoRA Stacking
blocks.body: When stacking multiple LoRAs, set /images:3 as your default batch size. This is the confirmed safe limit before you start hitting slot conflicts. Going higher is possible but increases the chance of generation errors.
